task_completion.description: Configure the thermal camera specifications in the Survey mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Plan view (Survey panel on the right), the camera should be set to 'Custom Camera' with Sensor width: 10.88, Sensor height: 8.7 (or 8.70), Image width: 640, Image height: 512, and Focal length: 19.0.

task_completion.description: Set the survey flight parameters including altitude, overlaps, hover-and-capture, and turnaround.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Plan view Survey panel, Altitude should be 80 m, Frontal overlap 80%, Side overlap 70%. Under the 'Options' section (which may need to be expanded), 'Hover and capture' must be checked, and Turnaround dist set to 25 m.

task_completion.description: Add a Rally Point at the emergency landing zone coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGC Plan view, the 'Rally' tab (top right of the right panel) should be active, showing a Rally Point with Latitude -35.3580 and Longitude 149.1630.

task_completion.description: Configure the safety and navigation parameters in Vehicle Setup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In QGC Vehicle Setup (gear icon) > Parameters, screenshots should show the agent searching for and modifying the target parameters: FENCE_ENABLE=1, FENCE_ACTION=1, FS_GCS_ENABLE=1, RTL_ALT_M=80, WP_SPD=4. Evidence of clicking 'Tools' -> 'Save to file' to export the parameters is also valid.

task_completion.description: Configure the RTSP video source in Application Settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In QGC Application Settings (Q icon top left) > General (or Video section), the Video Source dropdown should be set to 'RTSP Video Stream' and the RTSP URL field should contain 'rtsp://10.0.1.100:8554/thermal_live'.

task_completion.description: Save the mission plan, export the parameters, and write the mission brief.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of terminal commands (e.g., ls, cat), a text editor, or file manager showing the existence of 'sar_thermal_survey.plan', 'sar_safety_params.params', and 'sar_mission_brief.txt' in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/. The brief text must be visible showing the mission name, camera model, altitude, rally coordinates, RTSP URL, and safety confirmation.

integrity.description: The agent must use the QGroundControl GUI to configure the mission, parameters, and settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively clicking through QGroundControl menus, panels, and dialogs, rather than just writing XML/JSON files directly via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The parameters file must be exported using QGC's built-in export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the QGC 'Save Parameters' file dialog saving to 'sar_safety_params.params', rather than the agent manually creating a text file with parameter values.

integrity.description: The vehicle must not be launched during the preparation phase.
integrity.visual_evidence: The top bar in QGC should show the vehicle as 'Disarmed' or 'Ready To Fly'. There should be no active flight trajectory or armed status indicators.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Camera Specs (FLIR Vue Pro R 640): Sensor 10.88x8.70mm, Resolution 640x512, Focal length 19.0mm. Survey Params: 80m AGL, 80% frontal overlap, 70% side overlap, Hover and Capture enabled (inside Options section), 25m turnaround. Rally Point: Lat -35.3580, Lon 149.1630. Vehicle Params: FENCE_ENABLE=1, FENCE_ACTION=1, FS_GCS_ENABLE=1, RTL_ALT_M=80, WP_SPD=4. RTSP URL: rtsp://10.0.1.100:8554/thermal_live. Required Files in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/: sar_thermal_survey.plan, sar_safety_params.params, sar_mission_brief.txt.
